title: Building an EV Charging Infrastructure from Homer to Fairbanks
summary: Building an EV Charging Infrastructure from Homer to Fairbanks A recap of our Fall 2021 Energy Speaker Series on electric vehicle charging in Alaska At the Fall 2021 Energy Speaker Series event on electric vehicle charging, we heard from three key players involved in developing a Level III charging network for Alaska’s largest road system from Homer to Fairbanks. Our speakers included Tim Leach from SparkBox LLC and Alaska Energy Authority’s EV Working Group, Kris...
